[Infinite / Max Hearts]
01000000 01CC0764 00000050

[Infinite Rupees]
02000000 01CC0760 0000270F

[Infinite Magic Powder]
01000000 01CC0780 00000014

[Infinite Bombs]
01000000 01CC077E 0000000A

[Infinite Arrows]
01000000 01CC077F 00000014

[Have 3/4 Hearts (Press ZL+ZR)]
80000300 01000000 01cc0770 0000000F
20000000

[Have Map/Compass/Nightmare Key/Stone Beak]

01000000 01CC07c8 00000001

[  Pokey Figure]
02000000 01CC07c8 00000100

[  BowWow Figure]
02000000 01CC07c8 00000200

[Invincible/Not working restart the game]
581F0000 00a2fcd0
780F0000 00001ea0
640F0000 00000000 40000000

[0 Retries death counter]
01000000 01cc05a4 00000000

[High Jump (ZL) ]
80000100
580F0000 01CC8B50
580F1000 00001528
580F1000 00000928
580F1000 00000018
780F0000 000000C8
640F0000 00000000 C1800000
20000000
